checks.desc: SFXManager procedural generation — 62 sounds pre-generated at startup, pool_size=6
BIOME_KEY_MAP in TransitionBiome correctly maps all 8 biome full keys to short keys
game_controller_effects.gd:30 — DAMAGE_LIFE dispatched (line 187) but NO SFX played for life loss. Only shield blocks get skill_activate. Missing: danger/error SFX on direct damage.
MenuPrincipalMerlin.gd:337,340 — calendar_button/collections_button mouse_entered handlers missing SFX (only animation). _on_calendar_pressed()/_on_collections_pressed() no SFX.
SelectionSauvegarde.gd — _on_continue_pressed():162, _on_new_game_pressed():172, _on_reset_pressed():176, _on_back_pressed():190 — no SFX on any button.
end_run_screen.gd — no SFX on victory/defeat display. Should play success/fail or partir_fanfare on run end reveal.
audio_integration.gd (456 lines) references SFXEngine class that does NOT exist anywhere in codebase. AudioIntegration.wire_run()/.wire_hub() are never called. Entire file is dead code.

MG-FIX-SFX-DOUBLE-TRIGGER — already in queue (minigame success double-play)
implementation_summary: store_oghams.gd: tick_cooldowns() now accepts active_ogham:String=''. Only ticks active ogham's cooldown (bible s.2.2). use_ogham() now sets state['oghams']['active_this_card']=skill_id. store_run.gd:170 passes active_this_card from state to tick_cooldowns().
patterns_learned: PAT-079: run_3d_controller tracks oghams locally (_ogham_cooldowns dict) — separate from StoreOghams. Both systems must stay in sync.
PAT-080: audio_integration.gd references SFXEngine class that doesn't exist — dead file that should be archived or removed.
